top_signals.title: "Europe lost many races" says AMI Labs CEO
top_signals.summary: Europe has fallen behind on text-based AI - known as LLMs - AMI Labs CEO Alex LeBrun told BTV's Tom Mackenzie at Vivatech 2026 in Paris, France. But it could still pull ahead in the race for world models - another evolution in AI that moves away from text-based models, towards spatial and physical intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Obama Seeks to Defend, Define Presidential Legacy With $850 Million Center
top_signals.summary: Barack Obama’s long-awaited presidential center opens this week poised as a monument to contradiction as much as to the former president. Miranda Davis reports from Chicago. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Starmer’s Hot Mic Moment Scoops UK-India Announcement on Trade
top_signals.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer inadvertently revealed Britain had resolved a trade impasse with India, after he and counterpart Narendra Modi were overheard at the Group of Seven summit saying an agreement had been reached.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jay Clayton DNI hearing in jeopardy as Trump says he will cancel meeting
top_signals.summary: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.
